function_explanation: The specified amount of persons/cargo depending on the scope of application/ vehicular category is to carry/ receive in a way, that the vehicle structure (permitted boundary values for strength, stiffness and stability) of the railway vehicle is preserved safely under all operating conditions and environmental influences. The cargo has to be fastened in specified position (securing of load).
examples_elements:
e.g. static / dynamic workload,
oscillation strength, torsional stiffness,
mechanical strength constituted by construction
reliable_warranty_of: the preservation of the vehicle structure
hazard_is_given_if: NON-preservation of the vehicle structure
relevant_part_hazard: Inadequate durability of car body and fastened structures
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to E: during total length of stay

examples_elements: securing of load
reliable_warranty_of: sufficient securing of load
hazard_is_given_if: securing of load fails
relevant_part_hazard: Inadequately secured charge/cargo
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to E: during total length of stay

function_explanation: The specified amount of persons/cargo depending on the scope of application/ vehicular category is to enclosure in a way, that it does not fall of the vehicle unintentionally. While doing so, the permitted boundary profile has to be satisfied under all operational conditions.
examples_elements: e.g. vehicle boundary profile, aerodynamics
reliable_warranty_of: the compliance of the boundary profile
hazard_is_given_if: NON-compliance of the boundary profile
relevant_part_hazard: Damage to vehicle loading gauge from car body
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to E: during total length of stay

reliable_warranty_of: Protection against falling off the vehicle
hazard_is_given_if: NO protection against falling off the vehicle
relevant_part_hazard: Inadequate durability of car body and fastened structures
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to E: during total length of stay

reliable_warranty_of: Protection against falling off the vehicle
hazard_is_given_if: NO protection against falling off the vehicle
relevant_part_hazard: Inadequately secured charge/cargo
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to E: during total length of stay

examples_elements: Lateral acceleration, longitudinal acceleration / jerks, flying stones
reliable_warranty_of: Compliance of permitted boundary values for physical strain (acceleration, handling of loads)
hazard_is_given_if: Physical strain (acceleration, handling of loads)
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard from detached vehicle parts, operating materials
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to E: during total length of stay

examples_elements: Lateral acceleration, longitudinal acceleration / jerks, flying stones
reliable_warranty_of: Compliance of permitted boundary values for physical strain (acceleration, handling of loads)
hazard_is_given_if: Physical strain (acceleration, handling of loads)
relevant_part_hazard: Inadequate durability of car body and fastened structures
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to E: during total length of stay

examples_elements: Lateral acceleration, longitudinal acceleration / jerks, flying stones
reliable_warranty_of: Compliance of permitted boundary values for physical strain (acceleration, handling of loads)
hazard_is_given_if: Physical strain (acceleration, handling of loads)
relevant_part_hazard: Insufficient crash durability
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to E: during total length of stay

function_explanation: Protection against immissions, e. g. biological/chemical, thermal, mechanical impacts, explosions, noise, vibrations, electrical impacts, EMV, radiations, pressure waves
reliable_warranty_of: Protection against immissions, compliance of permitted boundary values
relevant_part_hazard: Hazards through air pressure fluctuations (pressure surges) in the vehicle
hazard_classification_note:
to D: Pressure variations lead to sSlight Injuries at a maximum
to O: Extent of damage can almost be excluded
to E: during total length of stay

function_explanation: Protection against immissions, e. g. biological/chemical, thermal, mechanical impacts, explosions, noise, vibrations, electrical impacts, EMV, radiations, pressure waves
reliable_warranty_of: Protection against immissions, compliance of permitted boundary values
hazard_is_given_if:
Energy is released unintentionally,
emission boundary values are exceeded
relevant_part_hazard: Electric contact voltage too high during vehicle operation
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Extent of damage can almost be excluded, since the vehicle body can be considered as a Faraday cage
to E: during total length of stay

function: carry / receive / enclose equipment and add-on parts
function_explanation: To incorporate the in/on the vehicle installed/mounted devices that the mechanical structure of the vehicle, the connection and the add-on part are preserved and the boundary profile of the vehicle is satisfied, under all operational conditions.
examples_elements: Protection of third parties against self-loosening and flying off parts along the track
reliable_warranty_of: of the preservation of the vehicle struture at/around the installation site
hazard_is_given_if: NON-preservation of the vehicle structure at/around the installation site
relevant_part_hazard: Damage to vehicle loading gauge from mounted parts in motion (mirrors, flaps, plug-in units, current collectors)
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to serious injuries
to P: Person can dodge

function: carry / receive / enclose equipment and add-on parts
examples_elements: Protection of third parties against self-loosening and flying off parts along the track
reliable_warranty_of: of the preservation of the vehicle struture at/around the installation site
hazard_is_given_if: NON-preservation of the vehicle structure at/around the installation site
relevant_part_hazard: Inadequate durability of car body and fastened structures
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to serious injuries
to P: Person can dodge

function: carry / receive / enclose equipment and add-on parts
reliable_warranty_of: of the preservation of the structure of the add-on part/device
hazard_is_given_if: NON-preservation of the structure of the add-on part/device
relevant_part_hazard: Inadequate durability of car body and fastened structures
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to serious injuries
to P: Person can dodge

function: carry / receive / enclose equipment and add-on parts
reliable_warranty_of: the preservation of the connection of the add-on part/device at the vehicle structure
hazard_is_given_if: NON-preservation of the connection of the add-on part/device at the vehicle structure
relevant_part_hazard: Inadequate durability of car body and fastened structures
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to serious injuries
to P: Person can dodge

function: carry / receive / enclose equipment and add-on parts
reliable_warranty_of: of the compliance of the boundary profile
hazard_is_given_if: NON-compliance of the boundary profile
relevant_part_hazard: Damage to vehicle loading gauge from car body
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to serious injuries
to P: Person can dodge

function_explanation: To enable the persons to enter and leave the vehicle under all operating conditions in adequate capacity as safe as possible (personnel door)
examples_elements:
Opening doors 
(operational boarding/alighting)
reliable_warranty_of: the function at the right time
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard during entry and exit of personnel
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Extent of damage can almost be excluded
to P: Person can dodge

function_explanation: To enable the persons to enter and leave the vehicle under all operating conditions in adequate capacity as safe as possible (passenger door)
examples_elements:
Opening doors 
(operational boarding/alighting)
reliable_warranty_of: the function at the right time
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard to persons in entry or exit area during travel
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to P: Person can dodge
risk_assessment_references: cf. for this purpose functions in section Z to TSI 4.2.5.5.8

function_explanation: To enable the persons to enter and leave the vehicle under all operating conditions in adequate capacity as safe as possible
examples_elements:
Opening doors 
(operational boarding/alighting)
reliable_warranty_of: the function at the right time
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard due to clamping/crushing
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to serious injuries
to P: Person can dodge
additional_info: see also fct. K6

reliable_warranty_of: the function at the right place
hazard_is_given_if: Opening of the doors does not occur at the platform, or to the wrong side
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard to persons in entry or exit area while stopped
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
to P: Person can dodge
risk_assessment_references: cf. for this purpose functions in section Z to TSI 4.2.5.5.8
additional_info: Note: operational boundary conditions are to be taken into account

reliable_warranty_of: the function at the right place
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard during entry and exit of personnel
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Extent of damage can almost be excluded, as personnel is familiar with the risks of railway operation
to P: Person can dodge

examples_elements: Emergency door release, evacuation concept (locking of doors)
reliable_warranty_of: the function on the prepared way (emergency exit)
hazard_is_given_if: Evacuation in an emergency not possible
relevant_part_hazard: Evacuation of persons not possible during emergency, escape routes insufficient (e.g. driver escape door, emergency exits)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Extent of damage can almost be excluded, as necessary evacuation is extremely rare
risk_assessment_references: cf. for this purpose functions in section Z to TSI 4.2.5.5.9

function: Ensure climbing up and stepping up
function_explanation: The passenger/personnel has to be able to operate the devices for climbing up, moveable devices are to steer, to control and to power. The climbing up devices have to be protected against external influences.
examples_elements: Slip resistance, shape, warning signs, hinged step
reliable_warranty_of: the function on the prepared way
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard to persons in entry or exit area while stopped
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a serious injury
to P: Person can dodge
additional_info:
The hazard classification only refers to mechanically secured steps, handrails, etc.
In case of usage of extendable steps or hinged steps, which violate the vehicle boundary profile, the hazard classification has to be adjusted.

function: Ensure climbing up and stepping up
function_explanation: The passenger/personnel has to be able to operate the devices for climbing up, moveable devices are to steer, to control and to power. The climbing up devices have to be protected against external influences.
examples_elements: Slip resistance, shape, warning signs, personnel door
reliable_warranty_of: the function on the prepared way
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard during entry and exit of personnel
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death
to P: Person can dodge

function: Ensure climbing up and stepping up
function_explanation: The passenger/personnel has to be able to operate the devices for climbing up, moveable devices are to steer, to control and to power. The climbing up devices have to be protected against external influences.
examples_elements: Slip resistance, shape, warning signs, handicap ramps
reliable_warranty_of: the function on the prepared way
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard due to clamping/crushing
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a serious injury
to P: Person can dodge

function: Ensure climbing up and stepping up
function_explanation: The passenger/personnel has to be able to operate the devices for climbing up, moveable devices are to steer, to control and to power. The climbing up devices have to be protected against external influences.
examples_elements: Slip resistance, shape, warning signs
reliable_warranty_of: the function on the prepared way
relevant_part_hazard: Hazards through interior compartment design (e.g. fall risk, injury risk on sharp edges and corners, crushing, broken windows, hot parts)
hazard_classification_note:
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a serious injury
to P: Person can dodge

function_explanation: Steering, controling and powering the actuation of the devices for climbing up. Protection against external influences
examples_elements: Tank wagons, vehicles transporting hazardous goods
reliable_warranty_of: the loading of the cargo onto an appropriate vehicle für this purpose
relevant_part_hazard: Explosion, bursting of devices/ components (pressure, flying parts, spray effect, emitted gases or fluids.)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

function_explanation: Steering, controling and powering the actuation of the devices for climbing up. Protection against external influences
examples_elements: Tank wagons, vehicles transporting food
reliable_warranty_of: the loading of the cargo onto an appropriate vehicle für this purpose
relevant_part_hazard: Other hazards (e.g. toxic materials, steam emissions)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

reliable_warranty_of: process of loading in an appropriate manner
relevant_part_hazard: Explosion, bursting of devices/ components (pressure, flying parts, spray effect, emitted gases or fluids.)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

reliable_warranty_of: process of loading in an appropriate manner
relevant_part_hazard: Damage to vehicle loading gauge from car body
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

examples_elements: End position detection, weight/quantity detection and control, leakage detection
reliable_warranty_of: in permitted boundaries
relevant_part_hazard: Explosion, bursting of devices/ components (pressure, flying parts, spray effect, emitted gases or fluids.)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

function_explanation: Allowing the output of solid, liquid, gaseous, also powderized cargo. Appropriate protection needs to be present while unloading of hazardous freight.
examples_elements: Emptying devices
reliable_warranty_of: process of loading in an appropriate manner
relevant_part_hazard: Explosion, bursting of devices/ components (pressure, flying parts, spray effect, emitted gases or fluids.)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

examples_elements: Flow rate limits, residual loading
reliable_warranty_of: in permitted boundaries
relevant_part_hazard: Explosion, bursting of devices/ components (pressure, flying parts, spray effect, emitted gases or fluids.)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

function: Absorbing and transfering forces between vehicles
examples_elements: Traction and impact forces: screw coupling, buffer, shock absorption, coupling hook
reliable_warranty_of: Absorbing and forwarding of the forces and energies resulting from the operation within the permitted boundaries
hazard_is_given_if: No / insufficient absorbing and forwarding of the forces exists
relevant_part_hazard: Unintentional train braking through miscellaneous causes (e.g. mechanical damage)
hazard_classification_note:
to DQ: one person is killed at he most, if he/she stays at this time in the passage area
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

function: Absorbing and transfering forces between the vehicles
examples_elements: Traction and impact forces: screw coupling, buffer, shock absorption, coupling hook
reliable_warranty_of: Absorbing and forwarding of the forces and energies resulting from the operation within the permitted boundaries
hazard_is_given_if: No / insufficient absorbing and forwarding of the forces exists
relevant_part_hazard: Tracking failed, derailing
hazard_classification_note:
to DQ: one person is killed at he most, if he/she stays at this time in the passage area
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

function: Absorbing and transfering forces between vehicles
examples_elements: Traction and impact forces: screw coupling, buffer, shock absorption, automatic coupling
reliable_warranty_of: Absorbing and forwarding of the forces and energies resulting from the operation within the permitted boundaries
hazard_is_given_if: No / insufficient absorbing and forwarding of the forces exists
relevant_part_hazard: Unintentional train braking through miscellaneous causes (e.g. mechanical damage)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to sSlight Injuries

function: Absorbing and transfering forces between vehicles
examples_elements: Traction and impact forces: screw coupling, buffer, shock absorption, automatic coupling
reliable_warranty_of: Absorbing and forwarding of the forces and energies resulting from the operation within the permitted boundaries
hazard_is_given_if: No / insufficient absorbing and forwarding of the forces exists
relevant_part_hazard: Unintentional train braking through miscellaneous causes (e.g. mechanical damage)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to sSlight Injuries

function: Ensuring the automatic process of coupling (coupling and decoupling)
function_explanation:
The releasing of vehicles has to be made at the right time.

For multiple units/railcars
examples_elements: Executing de-coupling process automatically/electrically
reliable_warranty_of: Compliance of the specified coupling process.
hazard_is_given_if: Decoupling process takes place during drive.
relevant_part_hazard: Braking force reduced or not present
hazard_classification_note:
to DI: Cases of death can be expected, vehicle rolls out uncontrolled, or accelerates and rolls back uncontrolled (slope)
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
additional_info: For the division of safety responsibility, see hazard tree according to annex to SIRF

function: Ensuring the passage between the vehicles
function_explanation: The passage between the vehicles has to be protected. Displacement movements have to be limited, immissions have to be kept out, pressure tightness has to be ensured depending on requirement.
examples_elements: Bellows, pressure tightness
reliable_warranty_of: Passage on the prepared way
relevant_part_hazard: Hazards through interior compartment design (e.g. fall risk, injury risk on sharp edges and corners, crushing, broken windows, hot parts)
hazard_classification_note:
to DI: One slight injury can be expected at the most, as no passages exist in the hazard zone
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to sSlight Injuries

function_explanation: The track guidance devices of the vehicle (wheels, wheel sets) have to be designed in a way, that they ensure the track guidance safely and absorb and transfer the forces occurring at the operating of the vehicle, at all permitted speeds and infrastructure parameters, while utilizing of all component and installation tolerances as well as in wear condition of the components or the infrastructure, under all permitted operational conditions. The permitted boundary values of the infrastructure have to be complied safely.
examples_elements: Geometry, forces, accelerations
reliable_warranty_of: Track guidance within specified boundaries
hazard_is_given_if: NON-interaction of the geometies of wheel and rail
relevant_part_hazard: Tracking failed, derailing
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death

examples_elements: Wheel set, wheelset axle, bearing, etc.
relevant_part_hazard: Tracking failed, derailing
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death

examples_elements:
Ride quality under the aspect of driving safety, 
Control of ride quality
reliable_warranty_of: Compliance of the permitted acceleration boundary values
hazard_is_given_if: NON-compliance of the permitted acceleration boundary values
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard to occupants from excessive accelerations during travel (e.g. jerks, flying parts in the interior)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to sSlight Injuries
risk_assessment_references: cf. for this purpose functions in annex Z to TSI 4.2.3.4.2

examples_elements:
Electric drive: interaction substation-contact wire, contact wire-current collector, power supply, 
Diesel drive: intake of fuel, fuel supply / storage
reliable_warranty_of: Emission-free transmission, transfer, transportation and storage of traction energy within specified boundaries and to a sufficient degree
hazard_is_given_if: Energy or energy sources are released unintentionally
relevant_part_hazard: Fire hazard, smoke development
hazard_classification_note:
to DI: cases of death can be expected (in particular if hazard occurs on railroad station grounds or in tunnels)
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death

examples_elements:
Electric drive: interaction substation-contact wire, contact wire-current collector, power supply, 
Diesel drive: intake of fuel, fuel supply / storage
reliable_warranty_of: Emission-free transmission, transfer, transportation and storage of traction energy within specified boundaries and to a sufficient degree
hazard_is_given_if: Energy or energy sources are released unintentionally
relevant_part_hazard: Electric contact voltage too high during vehicle operation
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death
risk_assessment_references: cf. for this purpose functions in annex Z

examples_elements:
Transformer, power converter, diesel engine in case of diesel-electric drive
explosion protection on performance components,
e.g. in the form of flashovers, light arcs,  
exploding components, EMC, magnetic fields
reliable_warranty_of: low-emission energy transformation to a sufficient degree
hazard_is_given_if:
Energy is released unintentionally,
Emission boundary values are violated
relevant_part_hazard: Fire hazard, smoke development
hazard_classification_note:
to DI: cases of death can be expected (in particular if hazard occurs on railroad station grounds or in tunnels)
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death

examples_elements:
Transformer, power converter, diesel engine in case of diesel-electric drive
explosion protection on performance components,
e.g. in the form of flashovers, light arcs,  
exploding components, EMC, magnetic fields
reliable_warranty_of: low-emission energy transformation to a sufficient degree
hazard_is_given_if:
Energy is released unintentionally,
Emission boundary values are violated
relevant_part_hazard: Electric contact voltage too high during vehicle operation
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

examples_elements: Generate torque to the wheel
reliable_warranty_of: Transformation of the traction energy in driving force at the right time
hazard_is_given_if:
during entry/exit or switch of the driving cab in push-pull operations, energie is released unintentionally,
emission boundary values are violated
relevant_part_hazard: Vehicle is accidentally set in motion due to switching on traction
hazard_classification_note:
to DI: Several cases of serious injuries can be expected (in particular if hazard occurs on railroad station grounds or in tunnels)
to O: Failure of funtion does not inevitably lead to cases of serious injuries
to E: Hazard exists shortly (during stop and entry/exit)

function_explanation: For multiple units/railcars
examples_elements: Generate torque to the wheel
reliable_warranty_of: Transformation of the traction energy in driving force at the right time
hazard_is_given_if:
at the upgrated parked vehicle, energy is released unintentionally,
emission boundary values are violated
relevant_part_hazard: Vehicle is accidentally set in motion due to switching on traction
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
additional_info: For the division of safety resposibility, see hazard tree according to annex to SIRF

function_explanation:
For locomotives/driving trailer (locomotive-hauled trains) 

Special classification for leading vehicles in locomotive-hauled trainsets in condition of compliance of the operating regulation of leaving of the cockpit of vehicles [DB-RiL 492.0001 (according to TSI operation, all RTC (railroad traffic companies) are held to implement this in individual regulation)]
examples_elements: Generate torque to the wheel
reliable_warranty_of: Transformation of the traction energy in driving force at the right time
hazard_is_given_if:
at the upgrated parked vehicle, energy is released unintentionally,
emission boundary values are violated
relevant_part_hazard: Vehicle is accidentally set in motion due to switching on traction
hazard_classification_note: to O: low (due to operational measures)
additional_info: For the division of safety resposibility, see hazard tree according to annex to SIRF

function_explanation:
For locomotives/driving trailer (locomotive-hauled trains) 

Special classification for leading vehicles in locomotive-hauled trainsets in condition of compliance of the operating regulation of leaving of the cockpit of vehicles [DB-RiL 492.0001 (according to TSI operation, all RTC (railroad traffic companies) are held to implement this in individual regulation)]
examples_elements: Generate torque to the wheel
reliable_warranty_of: Transformation of the traction energy in driving force at the right time
hazard_is_given_if:
at the upgrated parked vehicle, energy is released unintentionally,
emission boundary values are violated
relevant_part_hazard: Vehicle is accidentally set in motion due to switching on traction
hazard_classification_note: to O: low (due to operational measures)
additional_info: For the division of safety resposibility, see hazard tree according to annex to SIRF

examples_elements: Generate torque to the wheel
reliable_warranty_of: Transformation of the traction energy in driving force in the right direction
hazard_is_given_if:
Energy is released unintentionally,
Emission boundary values are violated
relevant_part_hazard: Vehicle moves in the wrong direction
hazard_classification_note:
to DQ: at the most one person (shunter) is affected
to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to a case of death

examples_elements: Generate brake effect to the wheel
reliable_warranty_of: Transformation of the traction energy in driving force at the right time
hazard_is_given_if: during emergency braking driving force is greater than/equal to brake force (requirement TSI LOC & PAS)
relevant_part_hazard: Braking force reduced or not present
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function leads almost inevitably to cases of death
risk_assessment_references: cf. for this purpose functions in annex Z to TSI 4.2.4.2.2 (2)

examples_elements: Pressure generator, spring mechanism, compressed air reservoir, for the brake, drive motor, power converter
reliable_warranty_of: emission-free supply in sufficient amount
hazard_is_given_if: auxiliary energy for the actuation of the pneumatic braking system does not exist, the brake energy of the dynamic brake cannot be dissipated
relevant_part_hazard: Braking force reduced or not present
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death

examples_elements:
Pipe system for compressed air or hydraulic system,
Regulatory procedure inverter, 
Braking circuit,
Drive motor control during braking operation,
Eddy current braking circuit
continuous brake
reliable_warranty_of: emission-free preparation in sufficient amount and storage at the right place
hazard_is_given_if: Control/regulation of the pneumatic/hydraulic braking system fails,
relevant_part_hazard: Braking force reduced or not present
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death

function:
Generate brake force
Braking at v>0
function_explanation:
Compliance of the specified boundaries

For multiple units/railcars

For operation on steep sections, special requirements for the dynamic brake are defined, e.g. electrical brake in the steep section regulation (corporate guideline 465 - operation on steep sections - module 465.0001). Note: As dynamic brake is the priority braking regime on the steep sections, it has to fulfill higher requirements of effectiveness and availability.
examples_elements:
Braking concept:
Allocation of emergency braking, enforced braking, service braking,
Limitation of the maximum brake force
reliable_warranty_of: Compliance of the intended braking distance
hazard_is_given_if: the danger spot is exceeded
relevant_part_hazard: Braking force reduced or not present
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not inevitably lead to cases of death
additional_info: Für die Aufteilung der Sicherheitsverantwortung siehe Gefährdungsbaum gemäß Anlage zur SIRF.

function_explanation:
Compliance of the specified boundaries

For locomotives/driving trailers (locomotive-hauled trains)

Creditability of the electric brake only under conditions of the transport service regulations (FV 408): creditability dynamic brake 408.0722 annex 6 paragraph 8

Locomotive-hauled train under precondition of the compliance of the above mentioned operational regulation (currently implemented in VDV 757 from FV 408)

For the operation on steep sections, special requirements to the dynamic brake are defined, e.g. electric brake in the steep section regulation (corporation guideline 465 - operation on steep section - module 465.0001). Note: As dynamic brake is the priority braking regime on the steep sections, it has to fulfill higher requirements of effectiveness and availability. (-> higher safety classification)
examples_elements:
Braking concept:
Allocation of emergency braking, enforced braking, service braking,
Limitation of the maximum brake force
reliable_warranty_of: Compliance of the intended braking distance
hazard_is_given_if: the danger spot is exceeded
relevant_part_hazard: Braking force reduced or not present
hazard_classification_note: to O: low (due to the operational measures)
additional_info: Für die Aufteilung der Sicherheitsverantwortung siehe Gefährdungsbaum gemäß Anlage zur SIRF.

function:
Generate brake force
Braking at v>0
function_explanation:
Compliance of the specified boundaries

For locomotives/driving (locomotive-hauled trains)

Creditability of the electric brake only under conditions of the transport service regulations (FV 408): creditability dynamic brake 408.0722 annex 6 paragraph 8

Locomotive-hauled train under precondition of the compliance of the above mentioned operational regulation (currently implemented in VDV 757 from FV 408)

For the operation on steep sections, special requirements to the dynamic brake are defined, e.g. electric brake in the steep section regulation (corporation guideline 465 - operation on steep section - module 465.0001). Note: As dynamic brake is the priority braking regime on the steep sections, it has to fulfill higher requirements of effectiveness and availability. (-> higher safety classification)
examples_elements:
Braking concept:
Allocation of emergency braking, enforced braking, service braking,
Limitation of the maximum brake force
reliable_warranty_of: Compliance of the intended braking distance
hazard_is_given_if: the danger spot is exceeded
relevant_part_hazard: Braking force reduced or not present
hazard_classification_note: to O: low (due to the operational measures)

function:
Generate brake force

Overbraking,
Automatic brake, 
Inertia drive on slope

to DI: Several cases of serious injuries can be expected (in particular if hazard occurs on railroad station grounds or in tunnels)

function_explanation:
Under precondition of the compliance of the operational regulation for the exit of the driving cab of vehicles [DB-RiL 492.0001 (according to TSI operation, all railroad traffic companies (RTC) are required to translate this into own regulations)]

function: Divide up, design, and clad rooms
function_explanation: The rooms must be of sufficient size and shape for their purpose. Persons must not be able to injure themselves on floors, walls or ceilings. The partitions, internal doors, seats and floors must ensure safe operation. Luggage etc. must be able to be safely parked or deposited, it must be held sufficiently securely. The lighting of the rooms must be adequately ensured, sufficient visibility in the vehicle, to visual monitoring equipment and the front windows must be ensured.  Visibility shall be ensured by technical means. The lighting of the vehicle³s surroundings must be adequate. The climatic conditions in the vehicle must be ensured and monitored. The provision of catering and sanitary functions must be ensured. Communication between the occupants and information for the occupants must be ensured.
examples_elements: Partition walls, screen walls, interior doors, claddings, sharp edges, heat, electric shock, closing mechanisms of interior doors
reliable_warranty_of: integrity during intended use
hazard_is_given_if: Risk of injury during use
relevant_part_hazard: Hazards through interior compartment design (e.g. fall risk, injury risk on sharp edges and corners, crushing, broken windows, hot parts)
hazard_classification_note: to O: functional failure does not necessarily lead to Slight Injuries

function_explanation: Only the danger to the driver as a result of poor air quality is considered here. Other functions cover other resulting hazards, see SIFA, ATP.
examples_elements: ventilation
reliable_warranty_of: the requirements for maximum CO2 concentration in the Technical Specifications for Interoperability (TSI)
hazard_is_given_if: the CO2 concentration is outside the requirements of the TSI.
relevant_part_hazard: Gefährdungen durch unzureichende Belüftung
hazard_classification_note:
to DQ: at most one person (Tf) can be affected
to O: functional failure does not necessarily lead to death
to P: Person (Tf) can ventilate manually

function_explanation: Only the hazard of not shutting down the air conditioning system and the resulting distribution/forwarding of combustion gases is considered here.
examples_elements: Shutdown in case of fire (see K7)
reliable_warranty_of: Avoidance of the transmission or distribution of fire gases through the operation of the air conditioning system.
hazard_is_given_if: combustion gases are passed on or distributed through the air conditioning system.
relevant_part_hazard: Brandgefährdung, Rauchentwicklung
hazard_classification_note: to O: functional failure does not necessarily lead to a light injury
additional_info: The basic functional requirement is analogous to the requirements of the TSI.

function_explanation: The risk to passengers or staff due to poor air quality is considered here.
examples_elements: ventilation
reliable_warranty_of: sufficient supply of fresh air to persons (CO2 concentration within the requirements of the TSI).
hazard_is_given_if: there is no sufficient supply of fresh air for the persons concerned.
relevant_part_hazard: Gefährdungen durch unzureichende Belüftung/ Klimatisierung
hazard_classification_note:
to DQ: many persons may be affected (see ICE accident Bielefeld)
to O: functional failure does not necessarily lead to Slight Injuries
to P: Persons can ventilate, activate emergency call button, change carriages
additional_info:
can be solved operationally or technically and must be explained.

For the division of safety responsibility, see the hazard tree in the Annex to the SIRF.

function_explanation: The risk to passengers or personnel due to pressure fluctuations is considered here.
examples_elements: Pressure protection dampers for HVAC systems
reliable_warranty_of: the pressure protection in compliance with the conditions (see function "BD")
hazard_is_given_if: the pressure variations are outside the requirements of the TSI.
relevant_part_hazard: Gefährdungen durch Luftdruckschwankungen (Druckstöße) im Fahrzeug.
hazard_classification_note:
on DI: only slightly injured persons can be complained of due to pressure fluctuations
to O: extent of damage can almost be excluded
to E: for the entire duration of the stay
additional_info: By complying with the requirements for maximum pressure variations in tunnels according to the Technical Specification for Interoperability (TSI), hazards are excluded even without on-board pressure protection.

reliable_warranty_of: Compliance with hygiene and food conditions
relevant_part_hazard: Hazards due to food poisoning (e.g. galley dining car, water treatment)
hazard_classification_note:
to O: extent of damage can almost be excluded
to E: for the entire duration of the stay

to O: extent of damage can almost be excluded
to E: for the entire duration of the stay
additional_info: This line explicitly excludes security relevant announcements with their classification.

function_explanation: Communication link (especially in an emergency) Passenger --> Train attendant or conductor

reliable_warranty_of: Communication facilities available and available in sufficient quantity

additional_info:
see emergency brake (function K 4)

Provided that sufficient, functional and effective emergency brake actuation equipment is available, further communication channels may be dispensed with. 
Such a system should nevertheless be available in order to request rapid medical assistance in the event of health problems of passengers and/or operating personnel!
Security aspects are not considered in this classification!

function: Steer, diagnose, control the vehicle superiorly
function_explanation: Passenger emergency brake
examples_elements: Passenger emergency brake
operating_env_conditions:
Operational/ technical set of rules for the limitation of the extent of damage
i.a. B009 (for Germany)

Extent of damage is reduced by use of the function "Requirements to the passenger emergency brake", this reduces the probability of occurence for the damage with the severe extent, described in the TSI.

The passenger emergency brake in the realisation regarded here is a facility (without automatic release) which failure does not lead to the damage event directly. Thereby it represents an additional protection function.
reliable_warranty_of: Information of the driver
hazard_is_given_if: the driver is not informed about a hazardious situation in the passenger compartment which requires a brake
relevant_part_hazard: Passenger emergency brake request, failed
hazard_classification_note: to O: It is almost impossible that a failure of the passenger emergency brake leads to the extent of damage.
safety_requirements_sources: for this purpose respect requirement TSI 1302/2014: 4.2.5.3.5 (1)  in function K4.
risk_assessment_references:
cf. for this purpose functions in section Z to TSI Loc&Pas RST 1302/ 2014/EU
4.2.5.3.5 (1)
additional_info: For the allocation of the safety responsibility see hazard tree according to annex to SIRF.

function: Steer, diagnose, control the vehicle superiorly
function_explanation:
Passenger emergency brake override (EBO)

The compliance of the following operational regulations is provided: - blocking opposite track, fire protection concept, evacuation concept, emergency concept
examples_elements: Passenger emergency brake, EBO
operating_env_conditions:
Operational/ technical set of rules for the limitation of the extent of damage
i.a. B009 (for Germany)

Extent of damage is reduced by use of the function "Passenger emergency brake override", this reduces the probability of occurence for the damage with the severe extent, described in the TSI.

The passenger emergency brake override in the realisation regarded here is a facility, which failure does not lead to the damage event directly. Thereby it represents an additional protection function.
reliable_warranty_of: Bypass of an initiated emergency brake
hazard_is_given_if: the emergency brake cannot be bypassed
relevant_part_hazard: Insufficient accessibility of railway vehicles during emergencies (e.g. no traction in tunnel, failure of emergency call function, unintentional braking in critical environments, emergency lighting)
hazard_classification_note: to O: It is almost impossible that a failure of the passenger emergency brake leads to the extent of damage.
safety_requirements_sources: for this purpose respect requirement TSI 1302/2014: 4.2.5.3.5 (1)  in function K4.
risk_assessment_references:
cf. for this purpose functions in section Z to TSI Loc&Pas RST 1302/ 2014/EU
4.2.5.3.5 (1)
additional_info: For the allocation of the safety responsibility see hazard tree according to annex to SIRF.

additional_info:
VDV RiL 757 (915.0106 section 2 subsection 14) the effectiveness of the dynamic brake is to make up during appropriate velocity after start of the next train ride!

During steep section operation, check the effectiveness of the dynamic brake due to special operating regulations (see also function GD 1a/b)

For the allocation of the safety responsibility see hazard tree according to annex to SIRF.

to O: Extent of damage can almost be excluded

to O: Failure of function does not necessarily lead to cases of death

function: Ensure visual and acoustic recognizability of the vehicle
function_explanation: The head of train and the end of train have to be labelled by visual signals, the head of train also in darkness. For passenger trains this also applies to the end of train. The vehicle at the head of train has to have an acoustic signalling device in sufficient volume, which can be activated by the driver by switch. It has to be available during the whole time the vehicle is made ready.
examples_elements: Head-of-train device, train horn
relevant_part_hazard: Hazard due to failure to detect the vehicle (e.g. peak signal, tyfon)
hazard_classification_note: to O: Failure of function does not necessarily lead to cases of death

function: Protect installations of the driveway against unwanted feedback effects of the vehicle
examples_elements:
Transformer, converter, diesel engine in case of diesel-electric drive
Explosion protection on performance components,
e.g. in the form of flashovers, light arcs,  
Exploding components, EMC, magnetic fields
reliable_warranty_of: low-emission energy consumption to a sufficient degree
hazard_is_given_if:
Energy is dissipated unintentionally,
Emission boundary values are exceeded
relevant_part_hazard: Vehicle causes malfunctions on external systems (e.g. signal systems, safety systems, other vehicles)
hazard_classification_note:
to DI: cases of death can be assumed (in particular if hazard occurs on railroad station ground or in tunnel)
to O: there is no direct relation between failure of function and actual occurence of damage

function: Protect the vehicle against unwanted influences
function_explanation: The vehicle has to be protected against unwanted influences. On-board functions and devices have to be designed in such a manner, as they are not disturbed by permitted immisions, influences and mechanical loads from the installations of the driveway.
examples_elements: Protection against influences from the infrastructure on the vehicle (e.g. pilot, snow plough, protection devices against whirling gravel), overall protective measures in the vehicle, e.g. interference immunity (EMC)
reliable_warranty_of: Protection against influences from the infrastructure (see BD, KD)
hazard_is_given_if: no / unsufficient protection
relevant_part_hazard: Inadequate durability of car body and fastened structures
hazard_classification_note:
to DI: cases of death can be assumed (in particular if hazard occurs on railroad station ground or in tunnel)
to O: there is no direct relation between failure of function and actual occurence of damage

function_explanation: The vehicle has to enable and supplement appropriately the function of driveway side signalling devices at any time and at any place.

hazard_classification_note:
